statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: nohuto mirror: minimum DPC rate query path
links.summary: The decompiled kernel query path copies KiMinimumDpcRate into the system-information buffer, and the mirror docs record the matching MinimumDpcRate = 3 mapping.

links.title: Repo system research notes for kernel registry values
links.summary: The repo documents MinimumDpcRate = 3 as personal research and ties it to KiMinimumDpcRate.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider writes MinimumDpcRate = 3 for the current tweak.
